title: Jammu University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Jammu University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Jammu University Result 2026 notification released for UG 1st Semester (NEP) 2025-26 special exam rescheduling and UG 6th Semester Exam 2021, 2025 on the official website - coeju.com on 30-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Jammu University result.

content.text: Jammu University has issued important Jammu University Result 2026 and exam notifications for undergraduate students, including a re-notification for rescheduling of the special exam of UG 1st Semester (NEP) 2025-26 and Notification No. 124, 22 regarding UG 6th Semester Exam 2021, 2025. These updates guide students about revised exam dates and result-related processes for NEP-based first semester and final semester undergraduate courses. Jammu University Result 2026 notifications have been made available online on the official portal – coeju.com.

Students can access these notifications by visiting the Controller of Examinations website, opening the relevant notice and following the instructions for special exams or UG 6th semester results/exams. After checking the schedule or result information, they should verify course, semester, subject and date details carefully and contact their college or the examination branch in case of any confusion or discrepancy.

The latest Jammu University updates are focused on UG NEP and non-NEP undergraduate semesters, covering both lower and final semester students. These notifications are crucial for students awaiting special exam opportunities in UG 1st semester (NEP) and those linked to UG 6th semester 2021/2025 examinations and results.

Jammu University publishes all examination and result-related notices on the Controller of Examinations website, where students can open PDFs for special exam schedules, result publications and detailed instructions.

links.label: Re-notification – Rescheduling of Special Exam of UG 1st Sem (NEP) 2025-26
Jammu University – Controller of Examinations Home (All Results/Notices)

sections.heading: How to Check Jammu University Result 2026

content.text: Use the following steps to access Jammu University UG special exam and 6th Sem exam/result notifications:

items: Visit the Controller of Examinations portal: https://www.coeju.com/index.aspx.
On the homepage, look for the Latest Notifications / Results / UG Notices section.
Find entries titled similar to: RE-NOTIFICATION - RE-SCHEDULING OF SPECIAL EXAM OF UG 1ST SEM (NEP) 2025-26 NOTIFICATION NO. 124, 22 - UG 6TH SEM EXAM - 2021, 2025.
RE-NOTIFICATION - RE-SCHEDULING OF SPECIAL EXAM OF UG 1ST SEM (NEP) 2025-26
Click on the relevant notice link to open the PDF or detailed page.
Read the schedule, course and semester details, exam dates, paper codes and any result/evaluation instructions carefully.
For any linked result PDF or online result form, follow the instructions to enter your Roll Number/Registration Number and view or download your marksheet.

structured_links.label: Re-notification – Rescheduling of Special Exam of UG 1st Sem (NEP) 2025-26
Jammu University – Controller of Examinations Home (All Results/Notices)
